tool.installation-error: Failed to fetch index with IntelliJ IDEA tools metadata. This could occur due to issues with the connection to the https://www.jetbrains.com website. The index can be downloaded manually from https://www.jetbrains.com/teamcity/intellij-tool-index.json, and then the path to the index can be specified via the 'teamcity.intellij-tool.index.url' internal property. The value should be in the 'file:///local/path/to/index' format (see details in teamcity-server.log)

Failed to fetch bundled dotCover 2023.3.3 Cross-Platform. In case of limited internet access you can manually download the tool from https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package/JetBrains.dotCover.CommandLineTools/2023.3.3 and then upload the archive with the tool on the 'Administration | Tools' page (see details in teamcity-server.log)

Failed to fetch bundled ReSharper 2023.1.1. In case of limited internet access you can manually download the tool from https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package/JetBrains.ReSharper.CommandLineTools/2023.1.1 and then upload the archive with the tool on the 'Administration | Tools' page (see details in teamcity-server.log)

Failed to download Maven 3.9.6. This could occur due to issues with the connection to the https://repo.maven.apache.org website. The tool can be downloaded manually from https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/apache-maven/3.9.6/apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.tar.gz, and then the archive with the tool can be uploaded on the 'Administration | Tools' page (see details in teamcity-server.log)
